name: Almendral S.A.
summary: Almendral S.A., through its subsidiaries, provides telecommunication services in Chile. It offers mobile telecommunications services comprising voice, value added, data, broadband, and mobile Internet and fixed network services; and call center services for the corporate market. The company also provides integrated solutions, including data networking services, local and long distance telephony, Internet access, network leasing, and wholesale traffic services; and information technology services, such as data center, business process outsourcing, and operational continuity services. In addition, it holds real estate investments in the areas of Quilpu√É¬© and Curauma. The company was formerly known as Chilquinta, S.A. and changed its name to Almendral S.A. in 2001. Almendral S.A. was founded in 1921 and is based in Vitacura, Chile.
